case_title: MAQSOOD SHAIKH VS. GENADY GERSHFANG et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-16-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-16-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JAN-29-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
